diagram_title: Published Web Sidebar — C4 Component Diagram

systems.name: OpenCode Platform
systems.description: The OpenCode web UI and backend system

systems.name: C Gateway
systems.description: Root-level C process managing web route registration and reverse proxy

containers.name: Hono Backend (per-user daemon)
containers.description: Per-user Bun process serving the API

containers.name: Gateway Daemon
containers.description: Root C process with ctl.sock and reverse proxy

components.name: WebRouteSidebar
components.description: Sidebar panel showing route list with links and dropdown menus

components.name: SidebarShell globe tile
components.description: Globe icon button in sidebar utility bar

components.name: WebRouteRoutes (Hono)
components.description: Backend API route handling list/publish/remove via ctl.sock

components.name: ctlRequest helper
components.description: Node net.createConnection wrapper for ctl.sock JSON protocol

components.name: ctl.sock handler
components.description: Unix socket JSON command handler in the C gateway

relationships.description: Globe click navigates to /system/web-routes, mounts WebRouteSidebar
Sidebar calls api.list() on mount and api.remove() on user action
Route handler delegates to ctlRequest for ctl.sock communication
Sends JSON commands over Unix socket, reads JSON response
